theme_notes: Taglines draw from Trump declaring Iran is 'negotiating on fumes' during the nearly 3-month-old US-Iran conflict, London shattering heat records at 95°F with government warnings, Arsenal vs PSG Champions League final in Budapest on May 30, a fast-spreading Ebola outbreak threatening 10 African countries, and the Devil Wears Prada sequel hitting theaters with Hathaway and Streep.
settled: Iran is 'negotiating on fumes.' Your balance is a fume. Congratulations.
London hit 95°F and your debt cooled off. One record broken today.
Arsenal haven't won yet. You cleared the balance. You're already ahead.
youOwe: Less than a London pint in a heatwave. The shame costs extra.
Not even fumes. Trump wouldn't bother negotiating over this.
The Devil Wears Prada sequel has better receipts than you.
Champions League group stage money. Your partner wants the final.
London broke heat records. You're breaking your partner's spirit instead.
Arsenal waited 20 years for their final. Your partner won't wait that long.
Trump says Iran negotiates on fumes. You negotiate with IOUs. Somehow worse.
Enough to fund an Ebola testing kit shipment. Yet not a Venmo.
PSG's halftime snack budget. You're not even in the squad.
That's a Budapest hotel room for the UCL final. You're not in Budapest. You're in debt.
Iran's been at war 3 months. This debt is approaching that shelf life.
London issued government heat warnings. Consider this one for your finances.
PSG would spend this on pre-match champagne. You can't manage a payment.
The Ebola response spans 10 countries. Your debt spans one relationship. Worse coverage.
Trump convened his Cabinet over Iran. Convene yours over this.
The US-Iran war has diplomatic cover. This debt has none.
Israel launched 120 airstrikes in a day. Your partner has launched 120 sighs. About this.
Devil Wears Prada sequel: great reviews, great cast, great budget. You: just this number.
theyOwe: Barely a heatwave pint. In London right now, that's a constitutional right.
Less than what Iran put on the table. Still won't pay you, though.
Your partner owes you basically nothing. They're making it feel like everything.
Enough for a Prada knockoff. Your partner chose not to find out.
Not quite a Budapest final seat. Enough to start petty scorekeeping.
London's at 95°F. Your slow-building resentment: already there.
Enough to fund a small Ebola containment. Or just dinner. Your partner chose neither.
Arsenal's been waiting 20 years for this. You've waited since last Tuesday. Both valid.
Trump says Iran's on fumes. Your partner's been running on excuses.
Enough for a Budapest UCL final seat. Your partner got a better deal: not paying you.
London's breaking heat records. Your partner's breaking promises at scale.
PSG's player fines are smaller. Your partner is a red-card-level offense.
Iran's at the table. Your partner isn't even in the room.
London issued government heat warnings. This debt requires a government response.
The Devil Wears Prada sequel made this in opening weekend. Your partner: still TBD.
This is US-Iran ceasefire talks territory. Bring a mediator. Bring lawyers.
120 Israeli airstrikes in one day. One unpaid debt. Somehow this one's more personal.
